home_curated_desc: A selection of recently restored pieces from our permanent vault.
home_departments_desc: Navigate our extensive digital archives organized by academic discipline.
home_featured_desc: Discover the world's first analog computer. A masterpiece in ancient Greek engineering restored in stunning digital fidelity.
art_astrolabe_desc: An exceptionally preserved brass astrolabe used for maritime navigation.
art_codex_desc: A masterpiece of calligraphy featuring extensive gold-leaf illustrations.
admin_v2_panel_desc: Access to order and ticket management.
shop_plan_desc: Select your passes to explore centuries of preserved history. All tickets include access to the permanent collection.
shop_item_general_desc: Full access to all permanent galleries, current temporary exhibitions and botanical gardens.
shop_item_student_desc: Discounted admission for active students and academic researchers. Valid ID required upon entry.
shop_item_audio_desc: Enhance your visit with an in-depth audio tour narrated by the museum's chief curators.
checkout_desc: Complete your reservation for the Museo Padre Suárez experience.
auth_no_account: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth_has_account: Already have an account? Log in
auth_reset_desc: Enter your email to receive a temporary recovery link.
onboarding_welcome_desc: Discover a legacy of preservation and digital innovation. Step into an immersive journey through history, where every artifact tells a story waiting to be explored.
onboarding_desc_1: Explore hundreds of historic pieces with unprecedented detail from the palm of your hand.
onboarding_desc_2: Use Augmented Reality and 360º environments to feel history as if you were right there.
onboarding_desc_3: Discover pieces, complete your collection and rank up to become a Chief Curator.
map_museum_desc: Explore the historic galleries of the Padre Suárez Museum. The building features two main wings connected by the transition corridor.
SALA VI: Anatomía y Modelos Auzoux: SALA VI: Anatomy and Auzoux Models
room_paleontology_desc: Explore evolution, comparative anatomy, and unique fossils from our historic collection.
room_zoology_desc: Spectacular collection of taxidermy, malacology, and 19th-century biodiversity.
room_archaeology_desc: Collection of archaeological pieces and treasures from ancient civilizations.
room_anatomy_desc: Invaluable 19th-century clastic anatomy, work of Dr. Auzoux.
room_physics: Martínez Aguirre Room: Physics and Chemistry
room_physics_desc: Historic cabinet with original scientific instruments from the 19th-century laboratory.
room_geology_desc: Exhibition of minerals, crystals, and rocks with great scientific and aesthetic value.
room_instruments_desc: Collection of scientific instruments, optics, and historic audiovisual equipment.
room_dark_camera_desc: Space dedicated to optics and experimentation with light.
room_storage_desc: Reserve and conservation area for the museum's heritage.
tickets_share_msg: Check out my ticket for the Padre Suárez Museum! Visiting on {} with locator: {}
tickets_empty: You don't have any booked tickets yet
tickets_login_required: Log in to view your tickets
home_360_environments_desc: Virtual visit to the real museum
ar_point_qr: Point your camera at a piece or QR code
museum_closed_global: The museum is temporarily closed for global maintenance.
museum_closed_day: Closed for holiday or scheduled maintenance.
museum_full_day: Sorry, capacity for this date is full.
museum_event_day: Date reserved for private or institutional event.
auth_required_checkout: You must log in with your museum account to purchase tickets.
museum_capacity_exceeded: Order exceeds the maximum allowed capacity ({} people).
ar_visit_success: Visit registered! You've earned points for your rank.
shop_tester_desc: In TESTER mode, we simulate the Stripe gateway. The payment will be marked as completed and your tickets will be generated in Firestore and EmailJS.
shop_tester_success: Order completed successfully! Check your email.
tickets_error_24h: Date cannot be changed with less than 24h notice.
admin_scanner_error_used: Error: This ticket has already been used.
invoice_email_notice: You will shortly receive your tickets with QR code by email.
admin_scanner_warning_future: ATTENTION! This ticket is for another day. It has not been validated yet.
auth_error_invalid_credentials: Invalid credentials. Please check your email and password.
auth_error_user_disabled: This user account has been disabled.
auth_error_email_exists: An account already exists with this email address.
auth_error_weak_password: The password is too weak (minimum 6 characters).
auth_error_network: Network error. Please check your internet connection.
common_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
